title: Debug assertion sqlite3BtreeInsert: Assertion `pCur->curFlags & BTCF_ValidNKey' failed
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 UNIQUE AS(0), c1, c2);
UPDATE t0 SET c1 = 0, c2 = 0 WHERE(c0) >= 0;
CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,b);
UPDATE t1 SET b=1 WHERE a+25=100;
key_bug_features: UPDATE triggers an assertion error with UNIQUE constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT UNIQUE);
UPDATE t2 SET value = 'test' WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE t3(a INTEGER, b INTEGER UNIQUE);
